error_signature: IF node does not match condition
title: IF node condition fails despite showing true
symptom: The IF node fails to match a condition even though the expression test indicates it evaluates to true.
applies_when: Condition expression shows true in test
not_this_if: Condition is correctly evaluating to a boolean true
root_cause: The IF node may be interpreting the condition as a string instead of a boolean. This can happen if the expression is enclosed in quotes, leading to a mismatch in expected data types.
fix_steps: Edit the condition in the IF node
agent_instruction: Ensure the condition in the IF node is not enclosed in quotes and uses the correct expression.
